6:"$Sreact.suspense"
0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"AAAK Compression"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Adaptive Associative Abstraction Kernel (AAAK) is Mnemosyne's context compression algorithm. It reduces token count while preserving semantic meaning."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"The Problem"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Agent context windows are limited (4K–128K tokens). Raw memory dumps consume precious space. AAAK compresses related memories into concise summaries."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"How AAAK Works"}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Cluster"}],": Group related memories by vector similarity"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Abstract"}],": Generate a summary that captures the cluster's essence"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Associate"}],": Link the summary to original entries for drill-down"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Kernel"}],": Store as a dense \"memory kernel\" for efficient retrieval"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Compression Ratios"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"| Content Type | Raw Tokens | Compressed | Ratio |\n|--------------|-----------|------------|-------|\n| Conversation | 2,000 | 200 | 10:1 |\n| Documentation | 5,000 | 400 | 12:1 |\n| Code snippets | 1,500 | 300 | 5:1 |\n| Mixed content | 3,000 | 350 | 8:1 |"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Using AAAK"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Automatic compression during sleep\nmem = Memory(aaak_enabled=True)\n\n# Manual compression\ncompressed = mem.compress(memories, target_tokens=500)\n\n# Decompress for detail\noriginals = mem.expand(compressed.kernel_id)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Configuration"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["| Parameter | Default | Description |\n|-----------|---------|-------------|\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"aaak_enabled"}]," | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"True"}]," | Enable automatic compression |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"aaak_target_ratio"}]," | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"8.0"}]," | Target compression ratio |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"aaak_min_cluster"}]," | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"3"}]," | Minimum memories to form a cluster |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"aaak_max_tokens"}]," | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"500"}]," | Maximum tokens for compressed output |"]}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-warning","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L3",null,{"iconNode":[["path",{"d":"m21.73 18-8-14a2 2 0 0 0-3.48 0l-8 14A2 2 0 0 0 4 21h16a2 2 0 0 0 1.73-3","key":"wmoenq"}],["path",{"d":"M12 9v4","key":"juzpu7"}],["path",{"d":"M12 17h.01","key":"p32p05"}]],"className":"lucide-triangle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Lossy Compression"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"AAAK is lossy — fine details may be lost during compression. Critical facts should be stored in Semantic Memory (which is not compressed) or marked with high importance to avoid consolidation."}]}]]}]]}]}]],[["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/06qv3~~e._cb6.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-1",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0ch_p3vkb0uw2.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-2",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0fekzj03ltn5y.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-3",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0pqew2nbfoy2f.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-4",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/07.05twov8012.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-5",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/113wy2s~ukj5p.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-6",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0se1rt9lzyib_.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-7",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0e1gsufr5shdc.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-8",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/13n60-fppanm4.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-9",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0g~f0923b0wjv.js","async":true}]],"$L4"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"QQSqVRZ0L1fJQFST1lZ0f"}
